analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場主軸圍繞著中東局勢升高、石油價格大幅上升、川普政府重新實施霍爾木茲海峽封鎖等事件。投資者們正在等待財報與通膨數據的公布，以了解市場的走向。同時，全球晶片行業都在等待台灣積體電路製造公司（TSMC）即將發布的一份關鍵報告。市場情緒緊張，投資者們需要謹慎評估風險和機會。

【結語】
投資者們需要保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒所左右。今天的市場變化可能會對未來的投資產生重大影響。投資者們需要仔細評估風險和機會，確保自己的投資策略是合理和可行的。同時，投資者們也需要保持耐心和持續學習，以適應市場的變化和挑戰。

【精選個股】
AAPL - 蘋果公司 - 蘋果公司的訴訟對OpenAI的影響可能會對公司的未來發展產生重大影響。
TSM - 台積電公司 - 台積電公司即將發布的一份關鍵報告可能會對全球晶片行業產生重大影響。
NVDA - NVIDIA公司 - NVIDIA公司的股價下跌可能是由於中國DeepSeek事件的影響。
SHAK - Shake Shack公司 - Shake Shack公司的財務狀況和未來發展前景仍然樂觀，投資者們可以考慮買入。
風險提醒：投資者們需要謹慎評估風險和機會，避免被市場情緒所左右。

items.title: The whole chip trade is waiting on one report
items.summary: Almost every advanced AI chip on the planet is built in one place. Nvidia's Blackwell processors, Apple's silicon, custom accelerators for Meta and AMD — they all run through the same foundry in Taiwan. That foundry is Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM). TSMC is set to ...
items.zh_title: 全球晶片行業都在等待一份報告
items.zh_point: 全球大多數先進AI晶片都在台灣一家工廠生產，包括Nvidia的Blackwell處理器、Apple的晶片、Meta和AMD的自訂加速器。這家工廠是台灣積體電路製造公司（TSMC），即將發布一份關鍵報告，影響全球晶片行業的未來。

items.title: Jim Cramer Calls Apple’s OpenAI Lawsuit “Heavyweight.” Tim Cook Must Believe OpenAI Was Stealing
items.summary: Apple almost never sues, so when Tim Cook personally greenlit a complaint accusing OpenAI of stealing trade secrets and smuggling hardware prototypes out the door, Wall Street and Silicon Valley both took notice. The question now is whether the case disrupts OpenAI's IPO plans before a single share is priced.
items.zh_title: 克拉默稱蘋果對OpenAI的訴訟是重量級案件，蒂姆·庫克必須相信OpenAI偷竊了蘋果的機密
items.zh_point: 蒂姆·庫克親自批准對OpenAI的訴訟，指控其偷竊蘋果的機密和運送硬體原型，對OpenAI即將上市的IPO產生了影響。

items.title: Why Thomson Reuters Stock Crushed it on Monday
items.summary: The company is apparently handing out pink slips to members of its engineering team.
items.zh_title: 湯森路透股價大漲：公司裁員工程團隊
items.zh_point: 湯森路透股價大漲，原因是公司正在裁員工程團隊，對股價產生正面影響。

items.title: Perryman says data centers can be beneficial with protections
items.summary: With Microsoft and Chevron joining forces to build a self-powered $7-billion AI data center 20 miles south of Pecos and with other companies envisaging similar plans, Waco economist Ray Perryman says there are justifiable concerns about ensuring that data centers do not lead to problems with the electricity supply or transmission capacity, although many of those concerns are being addressed. ...
items.zh_title: 佩里曼認為資料中心若加強保護措施，對電力供應有益
items.zh_point: 資料中心建設引發關注，佩里曼認為若能夠有效保護電力供應，資料中心將對電力供應有益，避免可能出現的問題。

items.title: Senior Analyst: Banks Are Set for 25% Earnings Growth as the Capital Markets Boom Accelerates
items.summary: Q2 bank earnings kick off Tuesday with the biggest names on Wall Street reporting at once, and one senior analyst thinks the results could shock even the optimists. But his most interesting call has nothing to do with JPMorgan or Goldman.
items.zh_title: 銀行業預期收益增長25%　資本市場熱潮加速
items.zh_point: 一位高級分析師預測銀行業第二季收益將大幅增長25%，並認為這些結果可能會超出樂觀派的預期，但他的最有趣的預測與摩根士丹利或高盛無關。

items.title: Stock futures are little changed as Middle East tensions escalate; traders await earnings and inflation data: Live updates
items.summary: Oil prices surged and stocks slid on Monday after President Donald Trump said he would reinstate a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.zh_title: 股市未來指數微幅波動 中東局勢升高 交易者等待財報與通膨數據
items.zh_point: 中東局勢升高導致石油價格大幅上升，股市則出現下跌。美國總統唐納德·川普宣布將恢復對伊朗航運的封鎖，影響石油運輸。交易者正在等待財報與通膨數據的公布，以了解市場的走向。

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he planned to reinstate what he called a blockade on Iranian shipping, sending oil prices higher and stocks lower on Monday.
items.zh_title: 星期二的大宗股票新聞：未來交易日市場可能的動向
items.zh_point: 川普總統宣布重新實施對伊朗航運的禁運，油價上升，股市下跌。

items.title: Japan’s bond market is back in play after decades in the wilderness
items.summary: JGBs have been selling off amid policy normalization and concerns over Tokyo's spending plans, but experts say that they deserve another look from investors.
items.zh_title: 日本國債市場終於回歸市場焦點
items.zh_point: 日本國債市場在多年來的冷漠之後終於重新引起投資者的關注，儘管市場正面臨政策正常化和東京政府開支計畫的擔憂。專家認為，日本國債仍值得投資者重視。

items.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
items.summary: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.
items.zh_title: 法官認為川普訴訟IRS為「不當目的」；指示律師參與律師公會
items.zh_point: 川普對IRS的訴訟最終被司法部與IRS達成和解，同意成立一億八千萬美元的「法律戰爭基金」，但該基金後來被撤銷。

items.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
items.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.
items.zh_title: 川普建議霍爾木茲海峽貨物徵稅20%；重新啟動伊朗封鎖
items.zh_point: 川普建議對霍爾木茲海峽貨物徵收20%稅款，重新啟動對伊朗的封鎖，霍爾木茲海峽是主要石油運輸路線，也是美國和以色列與伊朗的持續戰爭的核心。

items.title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.
items.zh_title: 美國耗盡戰略石油儲備　川普承諾控制霍爾木茲海峽
items.zh_point: 美國戰略石油儲備的儲備量已經極度不足，政府報告指出儲備遭受嚴重設備故障、泄漏和洩漏的影響。

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”
items.zh_title: 我的兄弟在70歲時領取社會安全金，卻因癌症在領取第一筆金額後不久去世。為何要等待領取？
items.zh_point: 一位女性分享了她的兄弟在70歲領取社會安全金後不久去世的故事，質疑政府鼓勵延遲領取福利的建議。

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”
items.zh_title: 我67歲，有$140,000年金，該等到70歲領取社保讓妻子多領嗎？
items.zh_point: 一位67歲的退休者擔心自己的年金會被減少到$30,000年後，考慮延遲領取社保讓妻子多領取。

items.title: Why a borrowing binge by investors is a warning sign for the stock market
items.summary: Investors are increasingly borrowing to buy stocks, a reflection of greed in the stock market as they seek to amplify returns with margin debt. The growing pile of borrowed money has some on Wall Street nervous.
items.zh_title: 投資者借貸狂潮是股市警訊
items.zh_point: 投資者借貸購股的行為越來越普遍，反映出股市中的貪婪心理，透過借貸購股以擴大投資收益。這種借貸購股的趨勢讓一些華爾街人士感到擔憂。

items.title: SpaceX’s stock threatens to fall below the IPO price. Do investors face a ‘crisis’ if it does?
items.summary: The company has shed more than $800 billion in market value from its $2.67 trillion peak in less than a month.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股票價格恐跌破首次公開發行價格
items.zh_point: SpaceX 股票價格在短短一個月內從 2.67 萬億美元的峰值下跌超過 8 萬億美元，投資者是否面臨危機？

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天三天跌勢。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並且不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業匯總：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新發展，包括市場趨勢、投資機會和業界動態。

items.title: Chewy: Steady Growth And Undervalued
items.zh_title: 切威：穩健增長與低估值
items.zh_point: 切威公司一直保持穩健的增長趨勢，其股價被認為低估了公司的實際價值。

items.title: Shake Shack: A Buy On A Deeper Dip
items.zh_title: Shake Shack：下跌後買入
items.zh_point: Shake Shack 的股價可能會下跌，但投資者仍可考慮買入，因為公司的財務狀況和未來發展前景仍然樂觀。

items.title: Crude oil soars more than 9% as Trump reimposes Hormuz blockade, resumes military strikes
items.zh_title: 原油暴漲逾9%  川普重新實施霍爾木茲海峽封鎖、恢復軍事攻擊
items.zh_point: 川普政府重新實施霍爾木茲海峽封鎖和恢復對伊朗的軍事攻擊，導致原油價格大幅上漲逾9%。

items.title: World Markets Watchlist: July 13, 2026
items.zh_title: 全球市場觀察清單：2026年7月13日
items.zh_point: 全球市場在7月13日出現多種波動，包括美元、歐元、日元的走勢變化，以及各大股市的表現。

items.title: Psychedelic drugmakers could get boost from HHS, VA memorandum
items.zh_title: 精神藥物製造商可能從HHS、VA備忘錄中受益
items.zh_point: 美國衛生及公共服務部（HHS）和退伍軍人事務部（VA）發佈備忘錄，可能對精神藥物製造商帶來新機會。

items.title: Vault and Genesis agree to merge and create $8.71 billion Australian gold producer
items.zh_title: Vault 和 Genesis 農業合併，創造 8.71 億澳元金礦生產商
items.zh_point: Vault 和 Genesis 農業公司宣布合併，將創造澳大利亞規模最大的金礦生產商之一，預計合併後的公司市值將達到 8.71 億澳元。

items.title: Australia consumer sentiment climbs in July as fuel, rate worries ease
items.zh_title: 澳洲消費者信心在七月上升，燃油和利率擔憂減輕
items.zh_point: 澳洲消費者信心在七月上升，燃油和利率擔憂逐漸減輕，對於未來的經濟前景感到較為樂觀。

items.title: Form 4 Yext Inc For: 13 July
items.zh_title: Yext Inc. 13 日報告
items.zh_point: Yext Inc. 13 日提交了 Form 4 報告，內容可能與公司高管或重要股東的股票交易相關。

items.title: South Korea central bank to raise rates for first time in over three years on July 16: Reuters poll
items.zh_title: 南韓央行將於7月16日首次在三年半內調升利率：路透社民調
items.zh_point: 根據路透社的民調，南韓央行將在7月16日第一次在三年半內調升利率，表明央行正採取措施應對通膨。

items.title: Mesoblast reaches 300-patient enrollment in back pain trial
items.zh_title: Mesoblast 達成背痛試驗 300 名受試者入選
items.zh_point: Mesoblast 這家公司正在進行一項背痛試驗，試圖開發新的治療方法，已經達成 300 名受試者的入選，試驗的進展可能對未來的背痛治療帶來重要影響。
